name: M1_04a_Prepare_Drive
description: Erstellt und verwaltet Ordnerstrukturen in Google Drive

nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives event from MX_00_Event_Router for PROJECT_CREATED events

nodes.name: Parse Event Data
nodes.notes: Extracts event data and calculates step_key for year folder

nodes.name: Step Claimed?
nodes.notes: If claimed=true: proceed. If false: either DONE or IN_PROGRESS by another run

nodes.name: Handle Not Claimed
nodes.notes: Handles case when step was already claimed or done

nodes.name: Should Emit Event?
nodes.notes: If year folder exists, we still need to emit DRIVE_YEAR_READY for this project

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: =name = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.year }}' and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and '1vUEFxFpeCtDWgD75HE9PYsmlcCMWIwy3' in parents and trashed = false

nodes.name: Search Year Folder
nodes.notes: Searches for existing year folder in Projekte parent

nodes.name: Folder Exists?
nodes.notes: Check if year folder already exists in Drive

nodes.name: Create Year Folder
nodes.notes: Creates the year folder in Projekte

nodes.name: Extract Existing ID
nodes.notes: Extracts folder ID from existing year folder

nodes.name: Extract Created ID
nodes.notes: Extracts folder ID from newly created year folder

nodes.name: Complete Workflow Step
nodes.notes: Marks step as DONE with folder payload

nodes.name: Prepare Event Payload
nodes.notes: Prepares data for DRIVE_YEAR_READY event

parameters.query:
-- Mark input event as processed
UPDATE events SET processed_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $json.event_id }}'::uuid;

-- Emit next event
INSERT INTO events (event_type, project_id, payload, source_system, source_flow)
VALUES (
  'DRIVE_YEAR_READY',
  '{{ $json.project_id }}'::uuid,
  '{"year": {{ $json.year }}, "year_folder_id": "{{ $json.year_folder_id }}"}',
  'n8n',
  'M1_04a_Prepare_Drive'
)
RETURNING id, event_type::text, project_id;

nodes.name: Emit DRIVE_YEAR_READY
nodes.notes: Marks input event as processed and emits DRIVE_YEAR_READY

nodes.name: Prepare Skip Emit
nodes.notes: Prepares data for event when skipping (folder exists)

parameters.query:
-- Mark input event as processed
UPDATE events SET processed_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $json.event_id }}'::uuid;

-- Emit next event (year folder already exists from previous project)
INSERT INTO events (event_type, project_id, payload, source_system, source_flow)
VALUES (
  'DRIVE_YEAR_READY',
  '{{ $json.project_id }}'::uuid,
  '{"year": {{ $json.year }}, "year_folder_id": "{{ $json.year_folder_id }}", "reused": true}',
  'n8n',
  'M1_04a_Prepare_Drive'
)
RETURNING id, event_type::text, project_id;

nodes.name: Emit DRIVE_YEAR_READY (Skip)
nodes.notes: Emits event when year folder already existed

nodes.name: Done (Main Path)
nodes.notes: Success response for main path

nodes.name: Done (Skip Path)
nodes.notes: Success response for skip path

nodes.name: Done (Exit)
nodes.notes: Exit when step is in progress
